---
title: "Sophia Baker"
---

## Sophia Baker

**Dates:** (b.1838/9)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Elder sister of [[person:97]Anne Baker], she was the daughter of Major Thomas Richard Baker (1802-1884), J.P., 7th Fusiliers, Rtd. and Mary Frances Anderson Morshead (d. 1843), whose grandmother Elizabeth Yonge was a sister of CMY\'s grandfather. [LG 1906 Baker of Bayfordbury for parents]

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
